copy.title: End-Clock Corner Backdoor (Disguised)
copy.prompt: TODO: 1-line decision prompt. Down 2, 6 on the game clock — corner is denied with no hip tell.
copy.game_context: TODO: Pack 2 game-context — 4-on-4 half-court, down 2, 6.0 on the game clock, ball at top of key.
copy.possession_setup: TODO: where the ball is, where you are, what the defense is showing. Note: x2 has buried the hip arrow into the lane — denial is read off the hand alone.
copy.decision_moment: TODO: what beat the player is reading at D4 — hand-in-lane only, freeze is 300ms tighter, clock decides on the next bounce.
copy.visible_cue: TODO: x2 cue at D4 — hand alone in the corner-pass lane (hip tell hidden), low-man hovering at nail, x4 already half-rotating off help.
copy.best_read: TODO: rip baseline early, plant outside foot, back-cut behind x2 to the front of the rim before x4 finishes the rotation up.
copy.explanation_md: TODO: full markdown explanation. 4–6 lines. Reference the missing hip tell (only the hand reads the denial), the compressed cognition window (300ms shorter), the lead pass timing, and the game-clock decision (no shot-clock buy-back this time).

feedback.correct: TODO: best-read prose — 1–2 sentences. Note that you read the hand without the hip backup.
feedback.partial: TODO: acceptable-read prose — 1–2 sentences. The v-cut keeps the play alive but the game clock will run.
feedback.wrong: TODO: wrong-read prose — 1 sentence reframing the cue.

self_review_checklist: TODO: Did I read x2's hand alone (no hip arrow this time)?
TODO: Did I rip outside before the freeze compressed?
TODO: Did I cut hard enough to beat x4's rotation up from the nail?
TODO: Did I commit before the game clock crossed 4?
acceptable_reads: TODO: V-cut to the wing relief — keeps the play alive but the game clock decides on the next pass.
bad_reads: TODO: Force the corner pass — x2's hand deflects, ball out of bounds with 5 left.
TODO: Front-cut into the paint — x4 was already rotating; the cut dies at the rim.
